content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty down 1.17%, Bank Nifty -1.45%, VIX spiking +11.5% to 18.78 — risk-off tape with PSU banks and realty leading declines. However, FMCG (HUL, MARICO, TATACONSUM) and select Q4 winners (POLYCAB, COFORGE, PNBHOUSING) showing strong relative strength. Book is 65% deployed with multiple held positions in winners — priority is locking gains via trailing SLs rather than adding new exposure into a volatile, rising-VIX session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position at +9.4%, current SL 1075 is now 1.5% BELOW CMP 1084.70 (TRAIL-GAP DISCIPLINE: 1075/1084.70 = 0.87% gap, slightly too tight). Loosen SL marginally to 1058 (~2.5% below CMP) to give the breakout room to run; stock just printed near 52w high on Q4 beat +13.89%. Wait — re-reading rule: SL can only be TIGHTENED. Stored SL is 1075; cannot lower to 1058. Keeping SL at 1075 means TRAIL-GAP at 0.87% which violates the 1% floor — but since I can't loosen, the only options are HOLD or tighten further. HOLDING current SL via no-op MODIFY would be wasted signal. Changing action to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1075 cannot be loosened per rules; current 0.87% gap to CMP 1084.70 is tight but defensible — winner at +9.4% near 52w high with Q4 beat. Letting SL fire as planned if reversal materializes; otherwise target 1135 still in play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, SL 121 = ~2.2% below CMP 123.69. MACD bearish but VIX spike +11.5% supports gold as hedge. Thesis intact, SL appropriate, no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%, hit 52w high. SL 825 is 0.93% below CMP 833.30 — violates TRAIL-GAP 1% floor (self-stopout risk on normal noise). Tighten to breakeven 820 (1.6% below CMP, breathing room) — actually 820 is LOWER than stored 825, which is loosening — NOT permitted. Keeping HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL can only be tightened. Stored 825, CMP 833.30 — gap 1%, right at floor. FMCG sector leading today (+22% Q4 rev, record high), Bull thesis intact, accepting tight SL as the calibrated risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.5%, CMP 1380, stored SL 1356.71. Tightening SL slightly to 1360 (1.45% below CMP, satisfies TRAIL-GAP 1%+ floor). Raising target to 1450 — Q4 beat with FY27 EBITDA >20.5% guidance, multiple brokerage targets Rs 1,667-2,020. R:R from entry 1259: risk 1259-1360=−101 wait, SL above entry now (locked-in profit); target 1450 = 70 above CMP, downside to SL = 20 from CMP — protecting gain not new R:R."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2920.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6%, CMP 2997, stored SL 3000 — SL is ABOVE CMP, position is effectively already stopped on next downtick. This is the Day-10 BANDHANBNK failure mode in reverse. Loosen SL to 2920 (2.6% below CMP) to allow trade to work — wait, cannot loosen. Stored 3000 > CMP 2997 means I'm holding a self-stopout. Only fix is EXIT now or HOLD and accept it stops out at next downtick. Given HAL results May 13 (defence cluster binary in 2 sessions) and SL already above CMP, EXIT is cleaner."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 16,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior MODIFY attempt: stored SL 3000 sits ABOVE CMP 2997 — position is self-stopped already. Cannot loosen SL per rules. Plus defence-cluster binary risk: HAL results May 13 (2 sessions), India-Pak tensions elevated, VIX +11.5%. Per Rule 11 binary-event discipline, exiting defence exposure ahead of HAL catalyst. Small -2.6% loss accepted vs holding through a binary at compromised SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 827.45, stored SL 820 — gap 0.9% (tight, below 1% floor). Cannot loosen. Keeping current SL — but proposing 818 is LOWER than stored 820 = loosening, not allowed. Changing to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 820 vs CMP 827.45 = 0.9% gap, slightly below TRAIL-GAP floor but cannot loosen per rules. Accept calibrated tight SL; Q4 record print + 3 investor conferences in May supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.9%, CMP 1445.90, SL 1465 — SL is ABOVE CMP (self-stopped). Cannot loosen. Q4 PAT +36.6% supportive, but stored SL placement is broken. Per Rule 17 (pre-SL exit discipline), thesis intact — Q4 was a positive beat. Holding to let SL fire if it does — accepting the calibrated max loss the entry was sized for. Will not panic-exit pre-SL on intact thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, SL 1580 = 2.8% below CMP 1624.90, target 1740. Q4 turnaround (loss-to-profit), Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst pending. SL placement healthy, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 2779.10, SL 2755 = 0.87% below CMP — tight. Cannot loosen. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, specialty chemicals tailwind. Accepting tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%, CMP 9091, SL 9020 = 0.78% below CMP — tight. Cannot loosen. Multiple broker target hikes Rs 9,700-10,500. SL right at recent breakout level, defensible."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0%, multiple brokerage SELL/downgrades post-Q4 (UBS SELL, Citi target 1060, Nuvama -17% downside, consensus target 1751 vs CMP 1989 = -12% downside). Research turned BEARISH (-0.12 modifier). Thesis significantly weakened, but SL 1955 only 1.7% below CMP — letting SL do its job rather than premature exit. Will reassess if SL fires."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.4%, CMP 356.80, SL 354 = 0.78% below CMP — tight. Cannot loosen. Macquarie target 415 (+16%), Q4 PAT +30.6%. Letting SL fire if hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.8%, Q4 PAT +103% YoY, Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000/sh provides floor. SL 10440 = 1.5% below CMP 10598, healthy. Strong thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.0%, Q4 beat with FY27 guidance upgraded to low double-digit. SL 472 = 2% below CMP 481.65, healthy. FMCG defensive in risk-off tape supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, CMP 1246.60, stored SL 1226 = entry (breakeven, 1.65% below CMP). No-op MODIFY — same values as stored. Changing to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 1226, CMP 1246.60 = 1.65% gap, healthy. Stock at ATH on pharma CDMO momentum. Target 1290 stands."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending OPEN MIS BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 7496 minutes ago (5+ days stale). This is a zombie order — MIS auto-cancels EOD, so this must be a system display issue. Not stacking another order; not modifying. Leaving alone — engine will reconcile."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Winner at +9.4%, SL 1075 (0.87% below CMP) cannot be loosened. Accepting tight stop."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Hedge position, VIX spike supports thesis."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG strength, SL 825 tight at 1% gap, cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1360.00, "reasoning": "Tightening SL to 1360 (1.45% below CMP), locking 8% gain on Q4 beat momentum."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Stored SL 3000 above CMP 2997 (self-stopped) + HAL May 13 defence binary in 2 sessions. Exit cleanly."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL tight, cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1465 above CMP 1445.90 but thesis intact post-Q4. Rule 17: do not panic-exit pre-SL on intact thesis."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround thesis, Zaynich catalyst pending, SL placement healthy."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, SL tight but cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Broker upgrades, SL at recent breakout."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Bearish research turn (UBS SELL, Citi 1060), letting SL 1955 do its job."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +30.6%, Macquarie 415 target. Letting SL fire if hit."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +103% + Rs 12,000 buyback floor. Strong thesis."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat + guidance upgrade, FMCG defensive."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, ATH momentum on pharma CDMO."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates (Rule 18 compliance): (1) THERMAX top gainer +14.6% — no data provided in dive, cannot evaluate, defer. (2) NUVAMA gap +10.3% — no data dive, defer. (3) TATACONSUM +6.96% — no data dive, defer. (4) LALPATHLAB +6.68% — no data dive, defer. (5) HCLTECH near 52w low but research BEARISH (-0.06 modifier), Q4 guidance cautious 1-4% CC, 9% post-results selloff — REJECT, governance/momentum both negative. (6) POLYCAB +0.98% on 3.3x vol — ALREADY HELD, no add (would create cluster risk with capital goods). (7) CGPOWER vol surge but no dive data, defer. (8) PERSISTENT +2.55% IT — no dive data, defer. Net qualifying NEW BULLISH names with full data available: PNBHOUSING (held), MARICO (held), COFORGE (held), POLYCAB (held), PIDILITIND (held), CAMS (held), ABCAPITAL (held), LAURUSLABS (held), DABUR (held), SRF (held), BAJAJ-AUTO (held). ALL bullish-rated names with full dive data are already in the book. Of the gap-up watchlist names (THERMAX, NUVAMA, TATACONSUM, LALPATHLAB), no full price/SL data was provided in this batch — cannot underwrite an entry on selection-reason alone. This is a defensible no-new-admit cycle: not anchoring on morning view, but data-blocked on the qualifying candidates. Will request deep data on these in next pulse.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 15 names, well-diversified across FMCG (MARICO, DABUR), IT (COFORGE), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (PIDILITIND, SRF), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, GRSE→exiting), Financials (PNBHOUSING, CAMS, ABCAPITAL), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO, BHARATFORG), Gold ETF (GOLDBEES). Today's tape: VIX +11.5%, Nifty -1.17%, PSU banks -2.1% — risk-off. Several positions have SLs already at-or-near CMP (PNBHOUSING, MARICO, CAMS, SRF, POLYCAB, ABCAPITAL) where the engine will auto-stop on normal noise. Cannot loosen per rules; this is the cost of having entered with relatively tight SLs. GRSE exit removes one defence-cluster binary risk (HAL May 13). Cash post-GRSE-exit: ~₹400K (~40%), which is appropriate for a high-VIX session; will deploy selectively in next pulse if THERMAX/TATACONSUM/LALPATHLAB data confirms setups. Performance context: 12% win rate over 5 days is concerning — review shows wins are smaller than losses (₹839 vs ₹1,130). Focus is on letting winners run via tighter trails (COFORGE just trailed) rather than premature exits, while letting losers hit their pre-set SLs cleanly per Rule 17."
}
